title: Thugshells App Content
description: Remotely-updatable content displayed in the Thugshells app. Host this document (validated against this schema) on a static host (e.g. Cloudflare Pages); the app fetches it, caches the last-good copy, and falls back to values bundled in the build.

schemaVersion.description: Content format version. The app reads this first; bump it only for breaking changes so older installed app versions can degrade gracefully.

updatedAt.description: When this content was last edited (informational only).

timezone.description: Thug Shells' home IANA timezone (Los Angeles). Weekly stream times are AUTHORED in this zone; the app converts them to each device's local timezone for display. Events are NOT governed by this value — each event carries its own timezone (see events[].startsAt / events[].timezone).

quotes.description: Quote of the Day pool. The app picks one deterministically per calendar day.

events.description: Upcoming live shows. Past events may be filtered out by the app.

socials.description: Outbound links shown on the Socials tab, in display order.

announcements.description: Optional featured messages/banners. Not yet rendered by the app; reserved for future use.

text.description: The quote as displayed. No surrounding quotation marks.

source.description: Where it's from (e.g. 'TEDx talk', 'NAMM 2025'). Not currently displayed, but kept for attribution.

channelUrl.description: Main Twitch channel, opened by the 'Watch on Twitch' button.

startTime.description: 24-hour HH:MM authored in the document's `timezone` (Thug Shells' home zone). The app converts this to the DEVICE's local timezone for display, so viewers everywhere see the stream in their own time.

event.description: A physical live show. Displayed in the EVENT's own local timezone (the venue's), never the device's or the document's, so 8pm at the venue always reads as 8pm.

startsAt.description: ISO 8601 WITH the venue's UTC offset (e.g. 2026-08-02T21:00:00-04:00). The offset must match `timezone`; it encodes the local wall-clock time at the venue.

timezone.description: IANA timezone of the venue (e.g. America/New_York). Drives the displayed local time and zone label; must agree with the offset in `startsAt`.

streamUrl.description: If this show is ALSO streamed online, the watch link. Cross-references the event to a stream so fans who can't attend in person can tune in.

platform.description: Drives the brand icon and default color.

signupUrl.description: Hosted signup form (Mailchimp or similar). The provider owns confirmation and unsubscribe.

id.description: Stable unique id (used to remember dismissals).
